title: Bionl_Lean_Call parameters
description: A germline variant-calling workflow focused on ACMG Secondary Findings (research use only), with standardized QC, annotation, and per-sample reports.

input.title: Samplesheet CSV
input.description: CSV file for variant calling input (required).

outdir.title: Output directory
outdir.description: Where to write results (local path or gs://).

run_id.title: Run identifier
run_id.description: Identifier for this pipeline run. Written into the first column of ${outdir}/manifest/run_output_manifest.tsv. If omitted, Nextflow's auto-generated workflow.runName is used.

bins_bed.title: Exon bins BED file
bins_bed.description: BED file of unique MANE exon bins used by mosdepth for per-base coverage (MANE_bins_unique_exon.bed). Required for DB ingestion — provide a local path or gs:// URI when the file is not bundled in the repo.
